Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown

Class MarkdownWriter

java.lang.Object
java.io.Writer
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.SerializerWriter
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown.MarkdownWriter
All Implemented Interfaces:
Closeable, Flushable, Appendable, AutoCloseable
public class MarkdownWriter extends SerializerWriter
Low-level Markdown writer providing helper methods for producing Markdown output.

Extends SerializerWriter to provide Markdown-specific output helpers for headings, tables, lists, and inline formatting.

Notes:
  • This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.

  • Constructor Details

    • MarkdownWriter

      public MarkdownWriter(Writer out, boolean useWhitespace, int maxIndent, boolean trimStrings, UriResolver uriResolver)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      out - The underlying writer.
      useWhitespace - Whether to use whitespace formatting.
      maxIndent - The maximum indentation level.
      trimStrings - Whether to trim strings.
      uriResolver - The URI resolver for resolving relative URIs.

  • Method Details

    • heading

      public MarkdownWriter heading(int level, String text) throws IOException
      Writes a Markdown heading at the specified level.
      Parameters:
      level - The heading level (1-6).
      text - The heading text.
      Returns:
      This object.
      Throws:
      IOException - Thrown by underlying stream.

    • escapeCell

      public static String escapeCell(String text)
      Escapes a string for use inside a Markdown table cell.

      Escapes pipe characters and backslashes. Replaces newlines with <br>.

      Parameters:
      text - The raw text.
      Returns:
      The escaped text suitable for a table cell.

    • escapeText

      public static String escapeText(String text)
      Escapes a string for use in general Markdown text.

      Escapes backslashes and leading Markdown special characters.

      Parameters:
      text - The raw text.
      Returns:
      The escaped text.
